title: Centre Principal (Preschool)
description:
Our client is looking for a Centre Principal (Preschool) to oversee the overall operations and management of the preschool centre, ensuring high standards of curriculum delivery, staff performance, and a safe, nurturing learning environment in line with early childhood education guidelines.


Location: Paya Lebar Area


Key Responsibilities:

  • Oversee the day-to-day operations of the preschool centre, ensuring compliance with licensing and regulatory requirements (e.g. ECDA).
  • Lead and manage a team of educators and support staff to maintain high standards of teaching, care, and professionalism.
  • Ensure effective implementation of the preschool curriculum in alignment with early childhood education frameworks.
  • Monitor children’s learning and development, and work with teachers to support differentiated learning.
  • Foster a safe, inclusive, and nurturing environment for children’s holistic development.
  • Manage centre administration, including budgeting, enrolment, resource planning, and operational matters.
  • Maintain strong partnerships with parents through regular communication, meetings, and engagement initiatives.
  • Support professional development and performance reviews of teaching staff.
  • Ensure timely submission of reports and documentation as required by authorities or management.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Early Childhood Care and Education (Leadership) or equivalent.
  • Certification recognised by the Early Childhood Development Agency (ECDA) with L2 certification or above.
  • Minimum 5 years of teaching experience in a preschool setting, with at least 2 years in a leadership/management role.
  • Strong knowledge of early childhood curriculum frameworks and best practices.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong organisational and problem-solving abilities.
  • Passionate about early childhood education and child development.

Interested candidates are invited to send in your Resume in MS Word Format stating your past work experience, reasons for each job move, and your past and expected salary.


We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


By submitting an application to us, you will be deemed to have agreed for us to collect, use, and disclose your personal data which you have submitted to your prospective employers, for the purpose of job search, and/or other services which you have consented us to perform on your behalf.



Felicia Giovani (R2199602)
Cultivar Asia Pte Ltd | EA License: 19C9782

www.cultivar.asia

postedCompany.description:
Cultivar Staffing & Search is a home-grown, result-driven and award-winning staffing & search firm based in Singapore. Started off as an Executive Search firm focusing in recruiting Chief Financial Officers (CFO), we have grown from strength to strength over the years. From covering the Accounting & Finance sector, we now have a broader specializations in IT & Technology, Engineering, Pharmaceutical and Corporate Support functions. 


Our name Cultivar reflects our approach to recruitment. Just as cultivars (in botany term) are carefully selected and nurtured to produce the best results, we take the time to understand our clients’ unique requirements and carefully match them with the right candidates through through the use of effective tools, driven by our well-trained team of in-house recruiters.


We love achievements, and ours come after our stakeholders'. We are recognized by clients and candidates alike, in the form of testimonials, industry-awards, and social media reviews. Since our inception, we have won awards from the HR Vendor of the Year (VOTY) organzied by Human Resources Online:


1. Best New Recruitment Firm 2020 - Silver

2. Best New Recruitment Firm 2021 - Bronze

3. Local Hero 2023 - Gold

4. Best Recruitment Portal 2023 - Silver 


The recognitions were a testament of our commitment to our clients as a vendor of choice and reliability. This is built on the company’s firm belief that great organizations are driven by high calibre people. Our conviction is to make that connection and be an enabler of organizational excellence in South-east Asia.


At Cultivar, success is cultivated – one at a time!
postedCompany.name: CULTIVAR ASIA PTE. LTD.
